age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

UPDRS part III.Description: Motor Disorders Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale, part III (motor examination)

UPDRS Total.Description: Motor Disorders Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale, total score

MoCA.Description: Montreal Cognitive Assessment score, a measure of cognitive function

Age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

Disease duration.Description: Time passed since the participant was diagnosed with Parkinson's disease

LEDD.Description: Levodopa Equivalent Daily Dose, a standardized measure of the total daily dose of anti-parkinsonian medications

PIGD Score.Description: Postural Instability and Gait Difficulty score, calculated from specific items in the MDS-UPDRS

TD Score.Description: Tremor Dominant score, calculated from specific items in the MDS-UPDRS
